note: Committed, curated ground-truth corpus for H3.NET.Native interop conformance tests. Angular values are DEGREES; cells are zero-padded 16-hex strings (ulong). Doubles are full precision. Regenerate with tools/gen-fixtures/gen_fixtures.py (core corpus), tools/gen-fixtures/gen_inspection_fixtures.py (index_digits + icosahedron_faces; reuses the same sample_cells corpus), tools/gen-fixtures/gen_hierarchy_fixtures.py (hierarchy + child_pos + compact; reuses the same sample_cells corpus), and tools/gen-fixtures/gen_grid_traversal_fixtures.py (grid_ring + grid_path + grid_distance + local_ij + grid_disk_distances; reuses the same sample_cells corpus), and tools/gen-fixtures/gen_directed_edge_fixtures.py (directed_edge + neighbor; reuses the same sample_cells corpus). The nightly CI sweep covers the large/exhaustive cases; this corpus is intentionally modest.
